step_rationale: Early STEMI prediction biomarker; upregulated in acute myocardial necrosis.
mechanism: miR-203 is an early circulating biomarker for STEMI onset, marking acute myocardial necrosis ahead of troponin rise.

references.title: Serum miRNA-203 as a Novel Biomarker for the Early Prediction of Acute ST-elevation Myocardial Infarction.
